template: INSERT INTO address (address, address2, district, city_id, postal_code, phone, location) VALUES ("{address_address}", "{address_address2}", "{address_district}", {address_city_id}, "{address_postal_code}", "{address_phone}",{address_location})

template: INSERT INTO customer (store_id, first_name, last_name, email, address_id, active, create_date) VALUES ({customer_store_id}, "{customer_first_name}", "{customer_last_name}", "{customer_email}", {address_address_id}, {customer_active}, "{customer_create_date}")
description: Insert a new customer with personal and store information.

template: INSERT INTO film (title, description, release_year, language_id, original_language_id, rental_duration, rental_rate, length, replacement_cost, rating, special_features) VALUES ("{film_title}", "{film_description}", {film_release_year}, {film_language_id}, {film_language_id}, {film_rental_duration}, {film_rental_rate}, {film_length}, {film_replacement_cost}, "{film_rating}", "{film_special_features}")

template: INSERT INTO film_text (film_id, title, description) VALUES ({film_text_film_id}, "{film_text_title}", "{film_text_description}")

template: INSERT INTO payment (customer_id, staff_id, rental_id, amount, payment_date) VALUES ({payment_customer_id}, {payment_staff_id}, {payment_rental_id}, {payment_amount}, "{payment_payment_date}")

template: INSERT INTO rental (rental_date, inventory_id, customer_id, return_date, staff_id) VALUES ("{rental_rental_date}", {rental_inventory_id}, {rental_customer_id}, "{rental_return_date}", {rental_staff_id})

template: INSERT INTO staff (first_name, last_name, address_id, picture, email, store_id, active, username, password) VALUES ("{staff_first_name}", "{staff_last_name}", {address_address_id}, NULL, "{staff_email}", {staff_store_id}, {staff_active}, "{staff_username}", "{staff_password}")
